final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 4'd0;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 4'd1;
    end
end

endmodule
